item.title: Supercars on high alert with cyclone threatening to derail final race on North Island
item.description: A statement has been issued and officials are working closely with emergency services.

item.title: Fans left ‘heartbroken’ as McDonald’s quietly discontinues beloved menu item
item.description: McDonald’s has quietly discontinued a popular menu item, leaving fans of the dessert shocked and ‘heartbroken’.

item.title: My Reno Rules: Meet the Aussie families ready to put their renovation skills to the test
item.description: Four teams will transform two rundown homes under the watchful eye of billionaire businessman Adrian Portelli.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor scandal: Disgraced former prince under fire for ‘giving it large’ post eviction
item.description: Disgraced former prince Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor has been criticised for still ‘giving it large’ after his eviction from the Royal Lodge.

item.title: I’d never made a wedding cake in my life, then I agreed to make my best friend’s. These are the hacks that saved me
item.description: It took weeks of testing to uncover baking’s top secrets — and now the public needs to know.

item.title: Australians delay prescriptions, skip doses and use expired medicine as cost-of-living pressures bites
item.description: Some are choosing between food and treatment, with many unable to afford non-subsidised medicines, a study found.

item.title: Mum shares how her own family’s breakdown inspired a support group for estranged parents
item.description: ‘I never thought it would happen to me.’

item.title: NDIS overhaul uncertainty ‘deeply unsettling’ for people with disability as government weighs major reforms ahead of federal budget
item.description: Advocates say uncertainty is weighing heavily on the disability community, warning cost-cutting must not come at the expense of essential support.

item.title: Astronauts on Artemis II mission splash down in Pacific Ocean after record-breaking trip around moon
item.description: Applause erupted in NASA’s mission control as astronauts emerged from the spacecraft.

item.title: Supercars cancel final race due to intense cyclone in New Zealand
item.description: ‘A cyclone of this intensity leaves no other option.’

item.title: Rank outsider Changingoftheguard stuns field to win Sydney Cup at $61
item.description: The longshot held off challengers to win the marathon staying test.

item.title: Local hero Ryan Wood claims Toyota’s first Supercars win as cyclone forces big change in New Zealand
item.description: The 22-year-old held off a host of established stars to clinch victory.

item.title: Sir Delius ends Autumn Glow’s unbeaten streak in massive boilover at Randwick
item.description: The superstar was odds-on to make it 12 from 12, but fell short in the Queen Elizabeth Stakes.

item.title: Fake ‘miracle’ weight loss drug Retatrutide flooding online market as experts warn of dangers
item.description: Experts are warning of the serious dangers the counterfeit versions possess.

item.title: Australian Government launches ‘every little bit helps’ campaign for fuel crisis guidance
item.description: Ads will play across television and digital platforms on how you can play your part.

item.title: Aussie veteran Jason Day rockets into contention for fairytale US Masters bid
item.description: Jason Day remained cool in crisis as chaos unfolded around him and now has a shot at the green jacket.

item.title: Australia’s own Billy Elliot: Devoted mum works through chemo to help support son's ballet dream
item.description: ‘It would also be my dream knowing that Henry’s big goals don’t have to be impacted by my poor health.’

item.title: Kiss and Kill: Victorian Attorney‑General Sonya Kilkenny warns Office of Public Prosecutions over plea deals
item.description: The debate comes as a report found that most criminal cases end in guilty pleas, not trials, helping with heavy caseloads.

item.title: Home And Away: Wentworth and Rush actress Nicole da Silva set to join the cast as Summer Bay’s new doctor
item.description: ‘I look forward to audiences meeting Amelia in the coming months.’

item.title: Australian researchers make breakthrough in childhood cancer genetic testing
item.description: A crucial genetic change that has been hiding in plain sight has been identified.

item.title: Couples urged to filter tap water as PFAS chemicals found to harm fertility
item.description: A hidden danger could be lurking inside every glass of water.

item.title: Middle East war: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese to visit Brunei and Malaysia to secure fuel supplies
item.description: The announcement came after US-Iran peace talks collapsed without a deal.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Independent senator David Pocock wants Albanese government and taxpayers to fund new Canberra stadium
item.description: ‘This is something I have been pushing for since I was elected.’

item.title: Danish Queen Mary in mourning after her father's death in Hobart
item.description: John Donaldson famously ‘walked his daughter up the aisle and gave Denmark its Crown Princess’.

item.title: Hungary Prime Minister Viktor Orbán concedes defeat in ‘painful’ election result
item.description: The ousted leader was a close ally of both US President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin.

item.title: Rory McIlroy joins rare company with second straight Masters win as Jason Day suffers final-round slide
item.description: High drama on the final hole almost flipped the result on its head but the world No.2 prevailed again.

item.title: Australian veteran Jason Day deflated after blowing final-round shot at Masters win
item.description: The former world No.1 blew his best shot at winning the green jacket - but there was a silver lining.

item.title: Bernard Tomic and partner Keely Hannah reveal baby joy: ‘The most beautiful secret we’ve ever kept’
item.description: The crestfallen Aussie tennis player and his partner went silent for months.

item.title: No Doubt guitarist Tom Dumont reveals Parkinson’s diagnosis ahead of the band’s reunion in Las Vegas
item.description: ‘It’s been a struggle. It’s a struggle every day.’

item.title: Rising fuel costs trigger new Uber fee set to lift trip prices across Australia
item.description: The rideshare giant has also revealed how long it expects the measure to stay.

item.title: FIFA urges federal government to support construction of permanent football home
item.description: Football Australia was once described as ‘homeless’ by Graham Arnold. Now FIFA has intervened.

item.title: Three senior Victorian MPs quit politics and Jacinta Allan’s cabinet, triggering reshuffle ahead of state election
item.description: The Victorian ministers are leaving politics just months ahead of the November state election.

item.title: Teen swept into coastal cave in dramatic surf rescue at Warriewood in Sydney’s north
item.description: Rescuers briefly lost sight of the boy before he was spotted inside a coastal cave.

item.title: Coalition considers extending paid parental leave to 12 months as families push for more childcare options
item.description: The Coalition is weighing up a range of reforms as families cry out for more support.

item.title: Australia’s defence force to be led by a submariner for first time in history as Army gets its first female chief
item.description: The new chiefs will be forced to confront a number of challenges.

item.title: Concerns for AFL star Charlie Curnow after underwhelming start at Sydney Swans: ‘This is a big story’
item.description: ‘I just wonder about what Sydney have actually bought.’

item.title: NRL football boss Graham Annesley explains controversial disruptor rule: ‘Can’t go back to open season’
item.description: ‘We can’t go back to open season.’

item.title: Man arrested after allegedly assaulting, threatening to kill woman with firearm in Cessnock, NSW
item.description: The 34-year-old will appear in court on Tuesday.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan touch down in Melbourne ahead of four-day Australian tour
item.description: The couple greeted a huge crowd before hugs and photos with some special patients.

item.title: Jackson Warne blames government and COVID shot for famous father Shane Warne’s death
item.description: ‘Yes, he smoked and he drank, but how many more people in their eighties and nineties still smoke and drink a lot more than dad?’

item.title: Anna Kepner’s stepbrother charged with her sexual assault and murder on Carnival cruise ship
item.description: The 18-year-old was found dead under the bed in a cabin she had been sharing with her siblings.

item.title: Newcastle Knights star Dylan Lucas sidelined for a month with gruesome throat injury
item.description: Dylan Lucas remained in hospital for days after the weekend’s nasty incident.

item.title: Poland deploys humanoid robot to tackle wild boar problem in cities
item.description: Meet Edward, the 132cm tall robot patrolling streets with a very unusual job.

item.title: NSW female recruit allegedly sexually assaulted by male student at police academy in Goulburn
item.description: It’s alleged the pair had been drinking with other recruits at a premise nearby town before the assault.

item.title: Volatile fuel prices blamed as dozens of Qantas and Jetstar flights axed
item.description: Affected customers will be offered alternative flights or a refund.

item.title: Nicole Kidman reveals ‘weird’ career move after losing her mother Janelle
item.description: ‘She was lonely and there was only so much the family could provide.’

item.title: Roblox launches new accounts for children after government sounds alarm over grooming dangers
item.description: ‘‘Disturbing’ reports from users of the popular game prompted the updates.

item.title: Craig McRae resisting temptation to recall Bobby Hill prematurely as Jeremy Howe looms as forward-line solution
item.description: ‘I’m open-minded to all sorts of things.’

item.title: Melbourne Storm skipper Harry Grant fires back at ‘outside noise’ amid rare losing streak
item.description: ‘People can have their opinions, but that doesn’t mean too much.’

item.title: Forgotten star Matt Dufty to play first NRL game in nearly four years
item.description: The 30-year-old has answered an SOS call and will come face-to-face with old club.

item.title: Pamela Anderson arrives in Sydney for intimate Australian speaking tour telling audiences to ‘expect the unexpected’
item.description: The 90s icon is back in Australia and promising audiences something they've never seen before.

item.title: Mounting fears for Australia's oldest department store David Jones as rising costs impact bottom line
item.description: ‘They are very much on the precipice.’

item.title: Port Adelaide ‘furious’ as fallout to Zak Butters’ tribunal verdict takes fresh twist
item.description: ‘There’s no way Nick Foot can umpire a Port Adelaide game again while Butters is still at the club.’

item.title: More than 2000 Lego sets up for auction as Aussie collector offloads towers of building block kits after 50 years
item.description: More than 2000 building block sets are up for grabs in the major sale.

item.title: Man scoops up million euro Picasso painting in raffle with $165 ticket
item.description: The Parisian man spent $165 on the ticket.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Ships pass through Strait of Hormuz blockade as Donald Trump hints at second round of peace talks for Iran and US in Pakistan, Islamabad
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Australian allrounder Cameron Green shredded as horror run for Kolkata Knight Riders continues
item.description: ‘Cameron Green looks lost and miserable ... and doesn’t want to be out there.’

item.title: International Monetary Fund (IMF) warns treasurer Jim Chalmers against budget spending spree
item.description: ‘The closure of the Strait of Hormuz and serious damage to critical production facilities could cause an energy crisis on an unprecedented scale’.

item.title: Alex de Minaur and Carlos Alcaraz on collision course in Barcelona
item.description: The Aussie No.1 made a hot start in the opening round at his adopted home.

item.title: Unfiltered: Carlton captain Patrick Cripps opens up on lowest point of his career
item.description: ‘That was probably the first time I reckon as a player I started losing a little bit of confidence.’

item.title: Bold ‘KO punch’ to get AFL star Zak Butters emerges with $4.5 million on offer in first season
item.description: No club in history has ever stumbled into such an ‘interesting set of circumstances’.

item.title: Australians warned against cancelling their ‘Euro Summer’ plans as Qantas and Virgin slash domestic flights
item.description: The closure of Middle Eastern airspace is creating a double hit for international travel, forcing airlines to reroute flights while also reducing the number of available seats.

item.title: Victoria Police investigates sexual assault claims made by Ruby Rose against Katy Perry
item.description: Australian actress Ruby Rose has accused the singer of assaulting her at a Melbourne nightclub in 2010. Perry denies the allegations.

item.title: Jaryd Dawson, brother of Adelaide captain Jordan, found dead after frantic search
item.description: The 35-year-old new dad had been missing for just over 24 hours.

item.title: Wright Prospecting has partial win over Hancock Prospecting in court battle over Hope Downs iron ore riches
item.description: Gina Rinehart’s Hancock Prospecting and Angela Bennett’s Wright Prospecting have both had partial wins in a multimillion-dollar legal battle over some of the world’s most valuable iron ore areas.

item.title: Colombia plans to euthanise Pablo Escobar’s famous ‘cocaine hippos’
item.description: The animals descend from four hippos the drug lord illegally imported in the 1980s for his private zoo.

item.title: Prince Harry shows off footy skills as he tackles mental health with Movember at Western Bulldogs
item.description: The Duke of Sussex tried his hand at Aussie Rules while delivering a powerful message about fatherhood.

item.title: Beloved husband and dad Grant Northey remembered as ‘gentleman’ after fatal crash on Tamborine Mountain in Scenic Rim
item.description: ‘Could not have met a genuinely nicer guy.’

item.title: St George Illawarra young gun Loko Pasifiki Tonga wants out but club rejects request
item.description: ‘He doesn’t know what to do. That’s the problem.’

item.title: Grahame Begg hoping for perfect end to Sydney autumn carnival with Magic Time
item.description: ‘She looks in great order, and she worked strongly (on Tuesday) morning at Randwick.’

item.title: Looksmaxxing star Clavicular collapses mid‑livestream in suspected overdose
item.description: Moments before collapsing, the influencer told a stranger: “I’m f---ing destroyed right now.”

item.title: AFL tribunal reveals crucial reasons behind Zak Butters’ guilty verdict for umpire abuse towards Nick Foot
item.description: Ollies Wines has inadvertently played a key role in convincing the panel of his teammate’s guilt.

item.title: Australian Idol winner Kesha Oayda shares insight on ‘spectacular’ win
item.description: The first female winner in almost 20 years is swapping the slopes for singing, after shouting her friends a celebratory drink.

item.title: Beloved champion sprinter Falvelon succumbs to old age at 29
item.description: Tributes are flowing for the fan favourite, who paved the way for Australian horses to compete overseas.

item.description: Jaeger O’Meara was helped from the ground after an ‘innocuous’ incident at training.

item.description: He is the first person in Australia charged and convicted under the tough federal laws.

item.description: The Power superstar has already been fined for umpire abuse but the saga is far from over.

item.title: GWS Giants chief executive Dave Matthews set to step down after 15 years
item.description: Dave Matthews has been at the Giants since before they entered the AFL.

item.description: Your grocery bill may be about to get a whole lot bigger.

item.title: Nick Riewoldt says Zak Butters should win AFL tribunal appeal based on Jason Johnson driving antics alone

item.title: Australian researchers discover bee glue could treat severe burns and scarring
item.description: A humble bee farm could hold the key to a medical miracle.

item.description: It highlights the fragility of diplomatic efforts including historic negotiations in Washington.

item.description: It is the second such attack in the country in as many days.

item.description: It might be the middle child of Honda’s three-model SUV family in Australia, but the ZR-V hybrid is far from a middle-of-the-road offering.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Massive fire engulfs one of Australia’s last two oil refineries near Geelong amid global fuel crisis
item.description: Multiple explosions were heard at the refinery, which provides 10 per cent of the nation’s fuel.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: US President Donald Trump claims he is ‘permanently opening’ the Strait of Hormuz in blockade backflip
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Matildas claim comfortable win over Kenya despite ‘lost’ goal
item.description: ‘I’m really not quite sure how to explain that one.’

item.title: Young boy dies after being run over by a car in Dubbo
item.description: The four-year-old was rushed to hospital but couldn’t be saved.

item.title: Man charged with alleged social media threat to federal parliamentarian and weapon offences in NSW
item.description: The man was granted bail ahead of a court appearance.

item.title: Former AFL star Jake Carlisle departs Moama as ‘disgusting’ vision emerges
item.description: ‘What’s he doing? This is a disgrace.’

item.title: Fuel crisis heats up as one of Australia's two oil refineries catches fire
item.description: Australia’s fuel woes are about to worsen, following a major fire at a plant responsible for supplying more than half of Victoria’s fuel.

item.title: Aussie golf star Cameron Smith facing uncertain future with LIV Golf league on the brink of collapse
item.description: ‘Not sure the tour really cares all that much about anyone else.’

item.title: Volkswagen continues EV reset, with ID.3 and ID.4 being replaced with “true Volkswagens”
item.description: The German brand’s CEO says it had lost its way, with the ID.3 Neo set to steer it back towards its core identity.

item.title: Bali 3: Prison terms extended for Men sentenced over murder of Melbourne father
item.description: Zivan Radmanovic died in a late-night ambush carried out in a Canggu villa in front of his wife.

item.title: Hundreds of sheep killed as truck crashes on NSW highway
item.description: It’s unclear what caused the crash in the early hours of Thursday.

item.title: Elderly Australian man found dead in his Bali hotel room
item.description: Concerns grew as the man failed to respond to a number of attempts to wake him up.

item.title: Harry and Meghan continue their tour around Australia as royal commentator questions paid appearances
item.description: Tickets to hear Harry speak are selling for about $500, while Meghan is charging $3,000 for a short appearance at a Sydney hotel retreat.

item.title: Man fined almost $50,000 for trafficking threatened native lizards in NSW
item.description: The NSW Government hopes the fine will deter other animal traffickers.

item.title: England Test captain Ben Stokes admits to serious fears after freak cricket accident: ‘Might not be here’
item.description: The England Test captain says he is only alive due to one small act and lucky timing.

item.title: Australia to boost defence spending by $53 billion under new strategy
item.description: It’s the biggest peacetime increase in defence spending in our nation’s history.

item.title: 2027 Volkswagen ID.3 Neo: Updated EV is a “true VW” with actual buttons and switches
item.description: The VW ID.3 has received an update substantial enough to merit a new name, bringing a more user-friendly interior and new features.

item.title: Pilot, 58, fighting for life after being freed from crashed light plane in NSW Southern Highlands
item.description: Footage from the scene shows the plane heavily damaged in a paddock.

item.title: Nissan plans product offensive for Australia, fuelled by Chinese partner
item.description: Nissan Australia is looking to take on the popular BYD Shark 6, re-enter the sedan market, and launch electrified Juke and Pathfinder replacements.

item.title: One Nation seat at risk as uncounted votes found in South Australian election bungle
item.description: Second recount ordered after 81 missing ballot papers found in Narungga seat.

item.title: Urgent manhunt underway after Kyle Quayle mistakenly released from NSW jail
item.description: NSW Premier Chris Minns said the error was ‘embarrassing’.

item.title: Jessica Carter Dawson pays heartbreaking tribute to late husband, Jaryd Dawson
item.description: Jaryd Dawson’s wife has revealed her pain as the AFL world wraps its arms around her and Jordan Dawson.

item.title: Ford Mustang GTD approved for Australia, with a catch
item.description: Ford’s answer to the Porsche 911 GT3 has been greenlit for local importation, but only if you can get your hands on one.
